explanation: This command represents a typical execution of PsSuspend targeting a critical process (msmpeng.exe). It can be used as a baseline for testing detection.
Uses spacing insertion to obfuscate the command line while maintaining the same functionality.
Replaces the short option '-i' with its long form '--interactive', which is functionally equivalent.
Reorders the arguments to test if the detection rule is sensitive to argument order.
Uses hexadecimal representation for the process ID (4 in decimal is 0x4 in hex) to test if the detection rule handles encoded values.
Adds unnecessary quotes around the process name to test if the detection rule is affected by such formatting.
